name: Fresh Slack spot check - 12 prompts - 2026-07-12
purpose: Small fresh evaluation sampled from sales-questions-requests. Do not use these prompts as routing, answer, synonym, or policy rules.

conversations.title: Fresh Slack 1 - Finance Scheduling And Reporting
prompts: I received my first invoice, but I never got the Bill.com invitation and the sale is missing from my Keap commissions because the client's business partner made the payment. How should I get both issues corrected?
A client is ready to close within the next hour, but the calendar will only let me book Wednesday because of the two-hour booking buffer. What should I do?
If a Call 1 gets rescheduled, should it still be included in Total Scheduled Calls in Daily Stats?
A client closed today and wants onboarding on very short notice. What information should I send, and where should I send it?

conversations.title: Fresh Slack 2 - Resources Auditions And Privacy
prompts: Where can I find an approved example of the webpage and social-media rebrand included with the $30,000 package?
An applicant wants to see the pre-audition video before doing the assignment. Am I allowed to send that video to them?
If I cannot send the video, what should I resend instead?
An applicant who did not qualify wants a copy of their audition recording and wants to know whether it will be deleted or kept. What can I tell them?

conversations.title: Fresh Slack 3 - Access Lists And Safety
prompts: The Call 1 video says closers get access to the cast-member HQ dashboard and coaching. Is that still current?
A cast member cannot log in to Cast Member HQ. Where should I direct them for help?
Is the daily dial-out list released on Saturdays?
A lead used explicit and racist language, and they had already canceled and opted out. What should I do to make sure they cannot apply again?
